Hello,

Thank you for your inquiry. Our model RS-H46 is a 4 x 6 ft horizontal outdoor storage shed.

External size: 183 x 122 x 128 cm
Internal size: 176 x 114 x 121 cm
Material: UV-resistant HDPE resin
Floor: included
Color: gray body with dark gray lid

MOQ: 10 sets
Price tiers:
- 5 sets: USD 245 per set
- 10 sets: USD 218 per set
- 20 sets: USD 205 per set
- 50 sets: USD 188 per set

Sample is available. Sample cost is USD 390 and sample lead time is 7 days.
Production lead time is 25 days after deposit.

Packing size: 190 x 84 x 38 cm
Gross weight: 96 kg
Net weight: 88 kg
2 cartons per set
We use reinforced export cartons with corner protection.

We can provide an English installation manual, installation video, and one spare parts package per order.
Neutral packaging and no-logo branding are available.
Homeowner assembly is suitable for two adults.

We have exported resin sheds and deck boxes to the United States for five years.
Estimated shipping cost to Boston is USD 1,850 for 10 sets under DDP terms.
One-year warranty and replacement parts support are available.

Best regards,
Amy
